---
name: New Skill Template
about: Propose a new production-tested skill template
labels: enhancement, new-skill
---

## Skill purpose

What does this skill do, in one sentence?

## Slash trigger

`/<name>` — must be lowercase, no hyphens, max 15 chars

## Input pattern

What does the user type after the slash command?

## Output

- Path: `[where the output lands]`
- Format: `[markdown / json / pdf]`

## Boundaries

What does this skill NOT do? What overlapping skills handle different cases?

## Real production use

How long have you been using this skill yourself? In what context?

## Draft SKILL.md

If you have a draft, paste or link it. Must follow the four conventions:
1. Slash naming
2. Brand-voice pre-flight (if producing external text)
3. Output path defined
4. Boundaries explicit
